title: Create Energistics
description: A resource pack for Applied Energistics inspired by the visual style of the Create mod.
body:
A resource pack for the Applied Energistics mod with textures inspired by the art style of the Create mod.

![Preview of some of the textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b137df955ee3707247e658966e50f902f8411da.png)

**Supported AE2 addons:**
- Applied Botanics
- ME Requester
- AE2 Insert Export Card
- Applied Energistics 2 Wireless Terminals
- Ars Energistique
- Create Applied Kinetics
- Extended AE
  

**Licensing disclaimer**

The item texture assets for the processors, annihilation and formation cores, and storage cells have either been reused or modified from [AndromadaGalaxy29](https://modrinth.com/user/Andromeda-Galaxy29)'s fantastic work on the [Refined Storage - ReCreated](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/refined-storage-recreated) resource pack which he generously gave me permission to reuse both through the MIT license on his project and direct permission from him personally. In the spirit of his generosity, I have also provided my assets in this resource pack under the MIT license and allow others to reuse my work here in their own projects as long as credit is also given.
